title: Netherite Plus: No Template
description: Upgrade to Netherite faster by removing the Smithing Template requirement.
body:
**🔥 Netherite Plus: No Template**

Upgrading to Netherite should feel powerful — not frustrating.

Netherite Plus: No Template removes the requirement for Netherite Upgrade Smithing Templates and allows players to craft Netherite armor and tools directly. No more structure hunting, no more RNG, and no more being blocked from progression.

Get the strength you earned, faster and smoother.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ What this mod does**

✅ Removes the need for Netherite Upgrade Templates

✅ Craft Netherite gear directly

✅ Keeps vanilla stats and balance

✅ Perfect for survival, modpacks, and servers

✅ No complicated mechanics

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🎯 Why use this mod?**

Many players love the power of Netherite but dislike being forced to search specific structures just to continue progression.

This mod keeps everything vanilla-friendly while removing unnecessary grind.
You still gather Ancient Debris.
You still smelt Netherite Scrap.
You still earn your upgrades.

👉 You just skip the template requirement

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5b53f11d9ee74f839eedd6fc8ebdb998e90b409.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)


This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
